name: longtask
description: State-aware long-task orchestration with five-phase workflow, three-layer module docs, multi-expert review, and scenario-based entry points

skills.name: longtask
skills.description: Main entry: auto-detect project state and route to the right scenario

skills.name: longtask-setup
skills.description: Bootstrap a new project: full five-phase workflow from discovery to review

skills.name: longtask-continue
skills.description: Resume interrupted work: detect current phase and pick up from recovery node

skills.name: longtask-review
skills.description: Run multi-expert review on completed implementation

skills.name: longtask-modify
skills.description: Modify existing architecture: add/remove/merge modules, update dependencies

skills.name: longtask-retrofit
skills.description: Create three-layer docs for an existing codebase that has no longtask documentation
